CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER, category VARCHAR);
SELECT arg_max(id, value) FROM test_table WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT arg_max(id, value) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE category = 'B' AND value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT arg_max(B.id, B.value) FROM test_table AS A JOIN test_table AS B ON A.category = B.category WHERE A.id < B.id;
SELECT arg_max(category, value) FROM (SELECT category, value FROM test_table WHERE value >= 10) GROUP BY category;
WITH ranked AS (SELECT id, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY value DESC) as rn FROM test_table) SELECT arg_max(id, value) FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1;
CREATE TABLE extra_table (cat VARCHAR, val INTEGER);
SELECT arg_max(e.cat, e.val) FROM extra_table e JOIN test_table t ON e.cat = t.category WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL;
